summary: Comprehensive testing of financial news website completed successfully. Both backend APIs and frontend functionality are working excellently with only minor status code discrepancies in admin CRUD operations.

minor_bugs.issue: Returns 200 instead of 201 for article creation
Returns 200 instead of 201 for category creation

passed_tests: Homepage renders with hero bento grid, ticker strip, latest news, and sidebar
Admin login with petar010591@gmail.com / Zvezda2023! works perfectly
Admin dashboard shows correct stats (9 articles, 8 published, 1 draft, 6 categories, 8 tags, 6 pages)
Admin articles list displays all articles with proper filtering
Admin create new article functionality works with success message
Admin article editor form with title, excerpt, content, category, tags, and SEO fields
Latest News page with category filters (All, Crypto, Markets, DeFi, Analysis, Regulation)
Education page loads with educational content
Contact form submission works with success message 'Message sent successfully!'
Search functionality at /search?q=bitcoin returns 4 relevant results
Individual article pages render properly with breadcrumbs, content, and metadata
Admin logout functionality redirects to login page
Market ticker API returns 8 tickers with fallback data
Pages API serves educational and legal pages
Admin stats API provides accurate counts

success_percentage.backend: 89% (16/18 tests passed - 2 minor status code issues)
